tasks.name: Shortlist a female fashion model in New York under $150/hour with 4.5+ rating for a specific date
tasks.description: Find female fashion models in New York, filter to those with hourly rates at or below $150 and ratings of at least 4.5 stars, sort by rating, open the top result, select availability for September 10, 2026, and add that model to a shortlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation link labeled "Find Talent" or "Models" to open the talent search page.
In the location filter field, type "New York, NY" and apply the location filter.
Use the category filter to select the talent type "Fashion Model".
Use the gender filter to select "Female".
Open the price or rate filter, set the maximum hourly rate to "150", and apply the filter.
Open the rating filter and select only profiles with "4.5 stars and up".
Open the sort dropdown and choose the option "Rating: High to Low".
Click on the first model profile in the sorted results list to open the profile details page.

On the model’s profile, select the date "September 10, 2026" in the availability or booking date field, then click the "Add to Shortlist" (or similarly labeled) button to save this model for that date.

tasks.name: Post a casting call for 3 male fitness models in Los Angeles at $100/hour
tasks.description: Create a new casting call targeting 3 male fitness models in Los Angeles, specifying a budget of $100 per hour, a shoot date of October 5, 2026, and a brief project description, then publish the casting.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the navigation option labeled "Post a Casting" or "Create Casting Call".
If a role selection appears, choose the option indicating you are a "Client" or "Casting Director" and continue to the casting form.
In the project title field, type "Fitness Campaign Shoot".
In the location field, type "Los Angeles, CA" and select it from any suggestions shown.
In the role or category section, select "Fitness Model" as the talent type and "Male" as the gender.
In the requirements section, enter the number of talents needed as "3" and set the budget or rate field to "$100 per hour".
Set the project date field to "October 5, 2026" and add a brief description like "Seeking 3 male fitness models for a one-day brand campaign shoot" in the description text area.
Select any visibility or application deadline option if present (for example, choose a deadline of "September 20, 2026").
Click the button labeled "Post Casting", "Publish", or similar to submit and publish the casting call.

tasks.name: Register as a new model and set availability for specific dates
tasks.description: Sign up as a new model named Alex Jordan, create a basic profile with location in Chicago and a primary category of Fashion Model, specify at least 2 languages, and mark availability for November 12 and November 13, 2026, then save the profile.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Sign Up" or "Join as Talent" button in the header or main banner.
On the account type selection screen, choose the option for "Model" or "Talent" and proceed to the registration form.
In the registration form, enter a name such as "Alex Jordan", fill the email field with "alex.jordan@example.com", and create a password (for example, "TestPass123!") in the password field.
In the location field, type "Chicago, IL" and select it from any suggested options.
In the category or primary talent type dropdown, select "Fashion Model" and, if there is an experience level field, choose "Intermediate".
In the languages section, select or type at least two languages, such as "English" and "Spanish".
Open the availability or calendar section, select the dates "November 12, 2026" and "November 13, 2026" as available days.
Scroll to the bottom of the profile form and click the "Save Profile", "Create Profile", or similarly labeled button to complete registration and save these details.

tasks.name: Book the more socially influential model under a 4-hour budget of $600
tasks.description: From your shortlist, compare two models whose hourly rates are $150 or less, select the one with the higher social reach or follower count, and submit a booking request for a 4-hour job on December 1, 2026, ensuring the total cost does not exceed $600.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the user account menu and select "Shortlist", "Favorites", or a similar option to open your saved models list.
From the shortlist, identify and click on the first model whose listed hourly rate is $150 or less to open their profile in a new tab or window.
Return to the shortlist and click on the next model whose listed hourly rate is also $150 or less to open their profile in another tab or window.
On each of the two opened profile pages, locate the section that shows social metrics (such as "Instagram Followers" or "Social Reach") and determine which model has the higher number.
Stay on the profile page of the model with the higher social reach and click the "Book Now", "Request Booking", or similarly labeled button.
In the booking form, set the booking date to "December 1, 2026" and set the duration field to "4 hours".

If a budget or rate confirmation field is present, ensure the total shown is at or below "$600" and enter a short message in the notes field like "Booking for a 4-hour campaign shoot on December 1, 2026".
Click the final "Submit Booking Request", "Send Request", or similarly labeled button to send the booking request to this model.

tasks.name: Create a 'Summer Campaign' favorites list with 2 male and 2 female models aged 20–30 in Miami
tasks.description: Create a new favorites list named "Summer Campaign" and add four Miami-based models to it: 2 female and 2 male, all within the age range of 20 to 30 years old.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the account menu and select "Favorites", "Lists", or a similar option, then choose the option to "Create New List".
In the list name field, type "Summer Campaign" and click the "Create" or "Save" button to create the list.
Return to the talent search page by clicking "Find Talent" or "Models" in the navigation.
Set the location filter to "Miami, FL", then use the age filter to set a minimum age of "20" and a maximum age of "30".

Use the gender filter to select "Female", then from the resulting list, open profiles and add 2 different female models to the "Summer Campaign" list using the "Add to List" or "Add to Favorites" control for that list.

Change the gender filter to select "Male", then from the updated results, open profiles and add 2 different male models to the "Summer Campaign" list using the same "Add to List" or "Add to Favorites" control.

Open the account menu, navigate back to "Favorites" or "Lists", and click on the "Summer Campaign" list to confirm that it contains exactly 4 models (2 male and 2 female) from Miami aged between 20 and 30.

tasks.name: Message the first 3 bilingual commercial actors in Los Angeles with 4+ star ratings
tasks.description: Search for commercial actors in Los Angeles who speak both English and Spanish, filter to those with ratings of at least 4 stars, then send a single casting inquiry message to the first three profiles in the results.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Find Talent" or "Actors" section from the main navigation to open the talent search page.
Set the location filter to "Los Angeles, CA" and apply it.
Set the category or role type filter to "Commercial Actor".
In the language filters, select both "English" and "Spanish" so that only actors who speak both languages are shown.
Open the rating filter and choose "4 stars and up" (or the equivalent) and apply the filter.
From the filtered results list, open the profile pages of the first three actors in new tabs or windows.

On each of these three profile pages, click the "Message", "Contact", or similar button, and in the message composer select all three actors as recipients (if a multi-select option exists) or paste the same inquiry text (e.g., "Casting for a bilingual commercial shoot in LA next month") into each individual message field.
Click the "Send", "Send Message", or similarly labeled button to send the casting inquiry to these three bilingual commercial actors.

tasks.name: Choose the cheapest monthly 'Basic' talent scouting subscription under $100 and proceed to review
tasks.description: Navigate to the subscription or plans page, identify the "Basic" talent scouting plan that bills monthly, select the cheapest option that costs less than $100 per month, and proceed through checkout until reaching the order review page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Pricing", "Plans", or "Subscriptions" link in the main navigation.
On the plans page, use any plan-type filters or tabs to show talent scouting or client plans, and locate all options labeled "Basic".
For each "Basic" plan option that offers monthly billing, compare the displayed monthly prices and identify the one with the lowest monthly cost that is under "$100".
Click the "Select", "Choose Plan", or similarly labeled button on this cheapest qualifying "Basic" monthly plan.
On the billing frequency step, if presented, make sure "Monthly" is selected as the billing interval.
Fill in any required account or billing information fields on the checkout page (such as company name, contact email, and billing address fields) without leaving the site.
Click the button labeled "Continue", "Next", or similar until you reach the order or subscription review page where the selected plan and its monthly price are summarized.

tasks.name: Register 2 seats for the next 'Intro to Modeling' workshop in New York after August 1, 2026 with pay-on-site
tasks.description: Find the earliest upcoming 'Intro to Modeling' workshop in New York scheduled after August 1, 2026, select it, register 2 seats, and choose a pay-on-site or pay-later payment option during registration.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Events", "Workshops", or similar section in the main navigation.
Use the location filter on the events page to select "New York, NY".
In the event type or category filter, select "Workshop" and, if available, type "Intro to Modeling" in an event search field to filter matching workshops.
Use any date filter or date range selector to show only events occurring after "August 1, 2026".
From the filtered list, identify and click on the earliest upcoming event titled "Intro to Modeling" to open its event details page.
On the event details page, click a button such as "Register", "Reserve Seat", or similar, and in the registration form set the number of seats or tickets to "2".

In the payment options section of the registration form, select the "Pay on Site", "Pay at Event", or a similar pay-later option, then click the "Complete Registration", "Confirm", or similarly labeled button to finalize the reservation for 2 seats.

website_type: model management and talent agency website
